## 📚 Knowledge Domains (Detailed)

<details>
<summary><b>☁️ Cloud Cyber Security (12-Month Diploma)</b></summary>

- **Linux & RHEL**: Deep Dive, Network & User Administration, Services, RHEL Intensive
- **Cloud**: AWS Architect Essentials
- **Security Frameworks**: ISO 27001/27017/27018 Lead Implementer & Auditor, PCI DSS QSA, CIS Top 20 Controls
- **Offensive Security**: Ethical Hacking, Web App Pentesting (WSTG), Network Pentesting
- **Defensive Security**: SIEM (HOA), Elasticsearch SOC Engineer, Threat Hunting & Observability
- **ICS/OT**: SCADA/ICS Security 101, SCADA Prevention & Detection, ISO 27019 & NIST 800-82
- **Certifications Covered**: CISSP, Vulnerability Assessment
- **Data Science**: Python Foundations, Machine Learning with scikit-learn, NLP, Deep Learning, Time Series, Big Data
- **Mathematics**: Linear Algebra, Statistics, Probability, Calculus

</details>

<details>
<summary><b>🚀 DevOps & Cloud Advancement (12-Month Diploma)</b></summary>

- **Containers**: Docker Deep Dive, Kubernetes (KCNA, CKAD, CKA, CKS, KCSA)
- **IaC & Config**: Terraform, Ansible, Chef, Puppet, Vagrant
- **CI/CD Tools**: Jenkins & Maven, CircleCI, TeamCity, Gradle, Test Sigma, Drone CI
- **Monitoring**: Splunk, New Relic, Nagios, Sensu
- **Service Mesh & Discovery**: Consul
- **Automation**: Python Automation, Python Selenium, JIRA with Python
- **Web Frameworks**: Python Flask
- **SCM**: Git & GitHub

</details>

<details>
<summary><b>🏗️ SysOps & Cloud Advancement (12-Month Diploma)</b></summary>

- **AWS** (23 sections): VPC, EC2, S3, RDS, DynamoDB, Redshift, Lambda, Kinesis, Route 53, CloudFront, CloudFormation, SQS, CloudTrail, NAT, VPN, Direct Connect, AD Connector, Auto Scaling, EBS, AMI, IAM
- **Azure Administrator**: AZ-104 covering Compute, Networking, Storage, Identity, Governance (11 modules)
- **CCSP** (ISC²): Cloud Architecture, Data Security, Application Security, Operations, Legal & Compliance
- **CCSK** (CSA): 12 Domains covering Cloud Architecture to AI/ML Security strategies
- **ISSAP** (ISC²): Access Control, Network Architecture, Cryptography, PKI, Risk Analysis, BCP/DRP, Physical Security

</details>

<details>
<summary><b>🤖 Artificial Intelligence (12-Month Diploma)</b></summary>

- AI Fundamentals & Python for ML
- Deep Learning (foundations + deep dive)
- Machine Learning: Mathematics, Python implementation, Advanced Topics
- Practical ML Applications & Model Deployment (2-part series)
- Computer Vision
- Natural Language Processing (2-part series)

</details>

## 🎓 B.Sc. Software Engineering — DIU (Course Highlights)

**Core Subjects:** Data Structures · OOP · Algorithms · OS · Computer Architecture · Database Systems · Theory of Computing · Compiler Design

**Specialized Tracks:**
- **AI & ML**: Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Deep Learning (applied coursework)
- **Security**: Information System Security, Digital Forensics, Cyber Law & Ethics, Information Security Risk Management, IS Audit & Assurance, Network & Communication Security
- **Data Science**: Data Warehouse & Data Mining, Statistical Data Analysis, ML-Driven Data Analysis (I & II)
- **Software Engineering**: Software Architecture & Design, Design Patterns, SQA & Testing, Web Application Development, Software Project Management
- **Systems**: SCADA, Digital Electronics & Logic Design, Data Communication & Networking
- **Professional**: Business Analysis, Professional Ethics, Employability 360
